programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Badeaa's Children
programme.desc: Follows Badeaa, a determined mother, who leads her children through a tumultuous journey towards a brighter tomorrow, as they confront myriad challenges together. programme.title: Badeaa's Children

Solafah Memar, Samer Ismail, Mahmoud Nasr, Nadine Tahseeine bek, Nadine Khory, Yamen Hajli, Rasha Sharbtgy, Ali Wajeeh, Sulafa Memar.

programme.title: Al King
programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Night
programme.desc: After years of separation, Ward, the ambassador's daughter, returns to the life of Najm Al Ghanem, the poor man who loved her and whom she loved in the past, carrying secrets and surprises that will change Najm's life forever. Carmen Bsaibes, Mahmoud Nasr.

programme.title: A.B.I.
programme.desc: Dogan leaves his family's dark and troubled past behind and runs away to start a new life with a new identity, but the past refuses to leave him alone and forces him to return once again when some secrets come to light. Kenan Imirzalioglu, Afra Saracoglu.

programme.title: The One I Loved
programme.desc: Erkan, who comes from a wealthy background, is assigned to complete his military service in a remote earthquake-prone town, where he meets Dicle. They get married, and he brings her from her modest world into his life in the capital. Helin Kandemir, Aytac Sasmaz.

programme.title: Past Tense
programme.desc: Hind lives a peaceful and happy life with her doctor husband, but her life takes an unexpected turn when her ex-boyfriend, Barak, reappears, bringing her hidden past to light and threatening her peace. Abdullah Boushehri.

programme.title: The Day I Met You
programme.desc: Adel and Dalia attempt to save their marriage with a getaway, leaving their daughter in the care of Dalia's sister, Dalal. When a tragic accident claims Dalia's life, Dalal decides to marry her sister's widower to protect the child and keep the family intact. Ali Badr Reda.

programme.desc: Imprisoned for vengeance and entangled in Turkeys' deadliest cartel, Haydar Ali's true war ignites upon his release, when he learns that the woman he has always loved got married to his closest ally. Devrim Ozkan, Deniz Can Aktas.

programme.desc: After discovering her husband's affair with a woman fifteen years younger, Aseel's perfect world shatters. She abandons her calm facade and transforms from a successful doctor into a woman consumed by vengeance. Sulafa Memar, Qays Sheikh Najib.

programme.desc: Disorder surrounds the hotel run by Rostom, a man obsessed with precision, as his orderly world clashes with his unruly guests, led by Shams, a fiercely independent woman who refuses marriage. Pamela El kik, Moatasem Al Nahar.

programme.desc: Determined to fulfill her mother's dream of a better life, a young woman faces numerous trials and personal loss, only to have her journey further complicated by a man she meets along the way. Hiba Nawab, Krushal Ahuja.

programme.title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
programme.desc: Accidentally Priya lost her child and became unable to conceive again. She convinced her beloved husband to bring another woman to become the surrogate mother for them. When Madhoo falls in love with the handsome loyal husband, things get complicated. Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Shyam Goel, Rani Mukerji, Preity Zinta, Salman Khan, Amrish Puri, Dalip Tahil.

programme.title: 12th Fail
programme.desc: In a bold move, IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma rejoins the world of education, standing alongside millions of hopefuls as they face the ultimate challenge of cracking the rigorous UPSC exam to script their destinies. Vikrant Massey, Medha Shankr, Anant Joshi, Anshuman Pushkar, Geeta Agrawal Sharma, Vidhu Vinod Chopra, Vidhu Vinod Chopra, Anurag Pathak.

programme.title: Husband Material
programme.desc: Rumi and Vicky, who used to be love birds, have their relationship entangled with the appearance of Robbi who seems to be a perfect husband material. Abhishek Bachchan, Vicky Kaushal, Taapsee Pannu, Jasmin Bajwa, Ashnoor Kaur, Kanika Dhillon, Anurag Kashyap.

programme.title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
programme.desc: Jamna Prasad Pandey does his best to send his parents on a pilgrimage to the chaar dhaam yatra even if the people think he is a stingy man. However, things take unexpected turn. Kunal Kemmu, Shweta Tripathi, Piyush Mishra, Alka Amin, Rajiv Gupta, Vipul Mehta, Vipul Mehta.

programme.title: Yaariyan 2
programme.desc: Upon moving to Mumbai, three cousins encounter a series of difficulties in their romantic relationships, as they struggle to balance the demands of their new lives in the bustling city with the emotional intricacies of love. Radhika Rao, Vinay Sapru, Radhika Rao, Vinay Sapru, Divya Khossla, Yash Daasguptaa, Meezaan Jafri, Pearl V Puri, Warina Hussain.

programme.title: Yaariyan 2
programme.desc: Upon moving to Mumbai, three cousins encounter a series of difficulties in their romantic relationships, as they struggle to balance the demands of their new lives in the bustling city with the emotional intricacies of love. Radhika Rao, Vinay Sapru, Radhika Rao, Vinay Sapru, Divya Khossla, Yash Daasguptaa, Meezaan Jafri, Pearl V Puri, Warina Hussain.

programme.title: Highest Viewing Rate
programme.desc: Shaima's life takes a drastic turn when she becomes famous on social media. However, she quickly realizes that achieving fame online comes with a high cost. Salma Abu Deif, Layla Ahmed Zaher, Mohamed Mahmoud, Entesar, Farah Yousef, Yasmine Ahmed Kamel, Samar Taher.

programme.title: In Vain
programme.desc: After their father's death, both Mahzoza and Mabroka find themselves obliged to move into the unwelcoming house of their uncle. Nevertheless, their uncle decides to put them into a mental hospital to seize their inheritance. Hayat Al Fahad, Soad Abd Allah.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Bamila Alkik, Stephanie Atala, Khaled Shabbat, Leen Gherra, Hakan Arslan, Lobna Meshlah, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Toubah
programme.desc: Toubah, a former criminal, tries to start a new chapter in Port Said, but his peace is short-lived when a figure from his past resurfaces, threatening to destroy the life he's trying to rebuild. Amr Saad, Maged Elmasry, Diab , Saba Mubarak, Mostafa Abo Serea, Marwa Al-Azli, Asmaa Abou Al Yazeed, Ahmed Saleh, Ahmed Halabah, Maged Al Masry.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: Wild Bees
programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou.

Therefore, they try to establish a life together despite the suffering. Kivanç Tatlitug, Serenay Sarikaya, Nur Surer, Nejat Isler, Canan Erguder, Ahmet Katiksiz, Hakan Bonomo, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: Highest Viewing Rate
programme.desc: Shaima's life takes a drastic turn when she becomes famous on social media. However, she quickly realizes that achieving fame online comes with a high cost. Salma Abu Deif, Layla Ahmed Zaher, Mohamed Mahmoud, Entesar, Farah Yousef, Yasmine Ahmed Kamel, Samar Taher.

programme.title: Haroun's Mother
programme.desc: A woman suffers from a lot of problems when she converts to Judaism in a society overwhelmed with racism. Hayat Al Fahed , Mohamed Gaber, Ahmed Al Jasmy , Abdel Mohsen Al Nemr, Soaad Ali, Faghriya Khamis, Fouad Ali, Mohamed Jamal Al Adl, Muhammad Shams, Hayat Al Fahad.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Toubah
programme.desc: Toubah, a former criminal, tries to start a new chapter in Port Said, but his peace is short-lived when a figure from his past resurfaces, threatening to destroy the life he's trying to rebuild. Amr Saad, Maged Elmasry, Diab , Saba Mubarak, Mostafa Abo Serea, Marwa Al-Azli, Asmaa Abou Al Yazeed, Ahmed Saleh, Ahmed Halabah, Maged Al Masry.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: Wild Bees
programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou.

programme.title: The Game: Champions League
programme.desc: With Wassim taking the grand prize, the competition takes an exciting turn. Mazou gathers his energy and determination to bounce back, rebuild his reputation, and show everyone what he's really made of after a tough loss. Hesham Maged, Chico, May Kassab, Mirna Gamil, Ahmed Fathy, Mohammed Tharwat, Moataz Al Tony, Ahmed Saad Wali.

programme.desc: S2026 E62 يطل الإعلامي الكبير عمرو أديب على جمهوره، حيث يقدم في كل حلقة فقرات سياسية واجتماعية واقتصادية وفنية، ويقوم بتحليل الأحداث اليومية بأسلوب مبسط ومسلي.
programme.title: الحكاية مع عمرو أديب

programme.desc: S2 E25 يذهب كمال بعد طرده من منزل نعمان إلى منزل توحة، أما راضية فتبحث عن كمال في كل مكان. من ناحية ثانية، تخبر ريم كمال عن رغبتها بالانفصال عنه.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان الموس

programme.desc: S1 E25 ينجح المحامي سالك في مساعدة شقيقات خالد في الحصول على ميراثهن، فيما تكتشف مديحة سرقة سالك لها ونصبه عليها في مركز التجميل الذي قامت بافتتاحه مؤخراً.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S2 E16 تعرف هالة بحقيقة عدم قدرتها على الإنجاب، فيما تتم خطبة مريم وكريم، بينما يتم الكشف عن الوجه الحقيقي لنيازي.
programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان موس

programme.desc: S1 E26 يتم الإفراج عن خالد ويكتشف الحال الذي وصلت إليه شقيقاته بعد تعرضهن للنصب، وتخبره مديحة بما حدث بينها وبين سالك الذي قام بطردها من مكتبه بعد أن سرقها، فيما يتفاجأ الجميع بتعرضهم للنصب على يد الخادمة اعتماد بعد زواجها من خال شاهيناز.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.title: ولاد تسعة موس

programme.desc: S1 E7 رشيد حجي.

programme.title: One Last Sin
programme.desc: In a daring and treacherous quest, Hisham gambles everything to locate his vanished sister by going undercover in a ruthless drug cartel. However, the events that follow defy all anticipation, altering the course of everyone's lives forever. Samer Ismail, Ammar Shalaq.

programme.title: One Last Sin
programme.desc: In a daring and treacherous quest, Hisham gambles everything to locate his vanished sister by going undercover in a ruthless drug cartel. However, the events that follow defy all anticipation, altering the course of everyone's lives forever. Samer Ismail, Ammar Shalaq.

programme.title: Athena
programme.desc: War correspondent Nadeen comes out of retirement after a horrific incident involving her sister. Determined to uncover the truth, she launches an investigation and discovers a connection to the dark web, where her sister will not be the last victim. Riham Haggag, Ahmed Magdy.

programme.title: Athena
programme.desc: War correspondent Nadeen comes out of retirement after a horrific incident involving her sister. Determined to uncover the truth, she launches an investigation and discovers a connection to the dark web, where her sister will not be the last victim. Riham Haggag, Ahmed Magdy.

programme.title: Kaleerein
programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.

programme.title: Kaleerein
programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.

programme.title: Radha Mohan
programme.desc: As grieving widower Mohan tentatively opens his heart to the devoted Radha, the restless spirit of his late wife, returns to expose her own killer and protect the family. Niharika Roy, Shabbir Ahluwalia.

programme.title: Radha Mohan
programme.desc: As grieving widower Mohan tentatively opens his heart to the devoted Radha, the restless spirit of his late wife, returns to expose her own killer and protect the family. Niharika Roy, Shabbir Ahluwalia.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Window Girl
programme.desc: Raised under strict control by her mother, Nalan gets married to Sedat, who comes from a very wealthy family. Soon, she discovers that his family is also unstable, forcing her to deal with problems from both sides. Burcu Biricik, Selma Ergec.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Zee Connect Bil Arabi
programme.desc: Presenting the latest celebrity news and interviews, along with reports on art, fashion, and lifestyle, through a range of segments that cover entertainment events and current developments.

programme.title: Konkan Diaries
programme.desc: Actor Addinath Kothare embarks on a coastal road trip along India's Arabian shoreline to discover historic sea forts, local culinary traditions, and hidden villages of the Konkan region.

programme.title: Color Of Rain
programme.desc: Yagmur, an artist who paints murals on electrical transformers, finds solace in a warm neighborhood she's always longed for. Confronting childhood traumas, she discovers familial love and a new path to a revitalized life. Gizem Karaca, Pamir Pekin, Hakan Bilgin, Asuman Dabak, Irfan Kangi, Ahmet Kapucu.

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Given their different racial backgrounds, Sanjay and Aditi are well aware that their parents will oppose their engagement, so the two resort to a cunning idea that may save their love, which is hiring fake parents to facilitate their marriage. Vikrant Massey, Kriti Kharbanda, Gauahar Khan, Jameel Khan, Yamini Das, Devanshu Singh, Manoj Kalwani.

programme.title: Kaise Mujhe Tum Mil Gaye
programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.
